cash.paymentNote: Grandma Mary will provide the prize.

payment.note: Grandma Mary will provide the prize.

subtitle: A playful birthday celebration made especially for Ethan
bigline: Five official spins. Three bonus spins. Every spin is a win.
marqueeStart: Ethan, your birthday celebration is ready.

welcome.title: Welcome to Ethan Birthday Slots
paragraphs: Grandma Mary created this playable birthday greeting especially for Ethan.
Cash prizes, if shown, are provided by Grandma Mary, not Playable Greetings.
welcome.overrideLine: Dad has agreed to serve as the official auditor.

scoreboard.title: Birthday Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: The largest cash prize is saved for the final bonus spin.

rules: Every official spin is a win.
Cash appears only during the bonus round.
Grandma Mary supplies any promised cash or gifts.
The final result can be shared with Grandma Mary.

finale.title: 🎉 Official Birthday Result
finale.note: Ethan completed all 3 bonus spins. The top cash prize is supplied by Grandma Mary, not Playable Greetings.

footer: Made especially for Ethan by Grandma Mary

claim.template: Ethan completed Birthday Slots and won up to $20. Grandma Mary will provide the prize in person.

slots.marqueeStart: Ethan, your birthday celebration is ready.

auditor.name: Dad
lines: Dad has begun monitoring the situation.
Dad requested a recount. The reels declined.
Dad objected to three additional spins. All three were approved.
Dad has officially run out of appeals.

officialSpins.title: Right on Time
officialSpins.message: The celebration was ready. It was only missing one person. Now that Ethan is here, we can begin.
officialSpins.auditorLine: Dad has begun monitoring the situation.

officialSpins.title: Immediate Upgrade
officialSpins.message: Ethan's day has just received an unscheduled improvement. No forms were submitted. No permission was requested. The upgrade stands.

officialSpins.title: Someone Pressed Start
officialSpins.message: This celebration did not appear by accident. Grandma Mary thought of Ethan and hoped this would make him smile.
officialSpins.auditorLine: Dad requested a recount. The reels declined.

officialSpins.title: A Moment to Keep
officialSpins.message: Celebrations move quickly. Good moments have a way of staying. We hope this becomes one of them.

officialSpins.title: 777 Bonus Unlocked
officialSpins.message: The reels have made their final decision. This celebration needs more celebration. Three Bonus Spins have been awarded.
officialSpins.auditorLine: Dad objected to three additional spins. All three were approved.

bonusNoCash.title: More Than Expected
bonusNoCash.message: The five official spins were complete. This moment was not required. That makes it our favorite kind of surprise.

bonusNoCash.title: Not Finished Yet
bonusNoCash.message: Apparently, stopping now would be premature. There is still more room for a smile and one final Bonus Spin waiting.

bonusNoCash.title: The Real Jackpot
bonusNoCash.message: The game is ending, but the best result may happen afterward: a laugh shared, a message sent, or a moment remembered. Maybe something wonderful happens next.

bonusCash.title: Cash Surprise
bonusCash.message: The Bonus Round has produced its first official finding: Ethan won $5. A very respectable beginning.

bonusCash.title: Prize Increased
bonusCash.message: The previous result was reviewed and found insufficiently exciting. Ethan now won $10. One Bonus Spin remains.

bonusCash.title: 777 Grand Prize
bonusCash.message: The final result is official. The largest prize was saved for last: Ethan won $20, provided by Grandma Mary.
bonusCash.auditorLine: Dad has officially run out of appeals.
